name: instacart-fixture
description: Instacart grocery search, product details, pricing, nutrition, delivery windows, and store browsing — GraphQL API via persisted queries, cookie_session auth

dependencies.searchProducts → getProductDetail: searchProducts returns productId used by getProductDetail
dependencies.searchProducts → getProductRatings: searchProducts returns productId used by getProductRatings
dependencies.getStoreCategories → getCategoryProducts: getStoreCategories returns slug used by getCategoryProducts
